title: Ian Huntley, Whose Murder of Schoolgirls Appalled Britain, Dies After Prison Attack
summary_full: The 2002 deaths of Holly Wells and Jessica Chapman, and the manhunt that led to a local school caretaker, shook the U.K.
summary_public: The 2002 deaths of Holly Wells and Jessica Chapman, and the manhunt that led to a local school caretaker, shook the U.K.
